pipelines.label: Daily Operator Startup
pipelines.description: Refreshes the operator picture for the day using health, state and private daily report generation.
pipelines.notes: Safe local startup workflow. No deployment, cleanup, restore or external sending.

pipelines.label: Health Audit
pipelines.description: Runs the core diagnostic and monitor checks used before operator work continues.
pipelines.notes: Stops on the first failed health check so failures remain obvious.

pipelines.label: Roadmap Review
pipelines.description: Refreshes Sentinel improvement priorities and the local feedback backlog.
pipelines.notes: Planning output only. No code is generated or applied.

pipelines.label: Stakeholder Update
pipelines.description: Generates the stakeholder-safe progress report and notification payload without sending messages.
pipelines.notes: Payload preparation only. No email, Slack or external delivery is performed.
